title: 两年过去，LLM 测试时计算缩放仍被忽视
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Noam Brown
@polynoamial
We've known about LLM test-time compute scaling since @ OpenAI o1.
Yet 2 years later labs still report scalar evals for models; safety orgs are still surprised when a scaffold does better via 100x inference; and RSPs still ignore inference budget when deciding critical thresholds.
Noam Brown
@polynoamial
21h
Article
Implications of Large-Scale Test-Time Compute
tl;dr: As LLMs become more capable, benchmark performance is increasingly a function of test-time compute. In fact, we likely don't know what the capability ceiling is for modern LLMs because it's too...
3:35 PM · Jun 9, 2026 62.5K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: 两年过去，LLM 测试时计算缩放仍被忽视
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 自 @OpenAI o1 以来，我们就知道 LLM 测试时计算缩放。 然而两年后，实验室仍在报告模型的标量评测；安全组织仍对某个脚手架通过 100 倍推理表现更好感到惊讶；而 RSP 在决定关键阈值时仍忽略推理预算。

key_excerpts.text: 自 @OpenAI o1 以来，我们就知道 LLM 测试时计算缩放。 然而两年后，实验室仍在报告模型的标量评测；安全组织仍对某个脚手架通过 100 倍推理表现更好感到惊讶；而 RSP 在决定关键阈值时仍忽略推理预算。
Post Log in Sign up Post Noam Brown @polynoamial We've known about LLM test-time compute scaling since @ OpenAI o1.

Yet 2 years later labs still report scalar evals for models; safety orgs are still surprised when a scaffold does better via 100x inference; and RSPs still ignore inference budget when deciding critical thresholds.
Noam Brown @polynoamial 21h Article Implications of Large-Scale Test-Time Compute tl;dr: As LLMs become more capable, benchmark performance is increasingly a function of test-time compute.
In fact, we likely don't know what the capability ceiling is for modern LLMs because it's too.

In fact, we likely don't know what the capability ceiling is for modern LLMs because it's too.
